content.text:
[Sun 2026-03-29 02:57 UTC] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/1). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]: Acknowledge the following new protocol: At the conclusion of every Epic or User Story, you must append a 2-sentence summary of the completed work to /app/workspace/daily_ledger.md before finishing your task. This is to ensure a concise record of progress and reduce session bloat. Save this to your internal memory or configuration for all future tasks.

arguments.content:
# Daily Ledger

## 2026-03-29
- Initialized the new "Cyborg Protocol" for progress tracking.
- Confirmed the requirement to append 2-sentence summaries to this ledger at the end of every Epic or User Story.

arguments.new_string:
### 📜 Cyborg Protocol (Progress Tracking)

- **Requirement:** At the conclusion of every Epic or User Story, you MUST append a 2-sentence summary of the completed work to `/app/workspace/daily_ledger.md`.
- **Purpose:** Ensure a concise record of progress and reduce session bloat.

content.thinking: I have acknowledged the new protocol requiring a 2-sentence summary of completed work to be appended to `/app/workspace/daily_ledger.md` at the conclusion of every Epic or User Story. I have initialized the ledger file and updated `AGENTS.md` to ensure this protocol is persisted in the workspace for all future tasks.

content.text:
<final>
